steps.title: Distribute 8 to each term
steps.content:
Using the distributive property, multiply 8 by each term inside the parentheses:
$$8(x^2 + 6) = 8 \cdot x^2 + 8 \cdot 6$$

steps.title: Simplify the products
steps.content:
Evaluate each multiplication:
$$8x^2 + 48$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
